Hero.title: Hi, I'm Justin
Hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer
Hero.description: I build end-to-end web products: solid APIs, polished interfaces, and the architecture that connects them. I mainly work with <tech>TypeScript</tech>, <tech>React</tech> and <tech>Node.js</tech>.

who.title: Who I am
who.body: I'm Justin, a full stack developer. I'm passionate about constantly learning and growing, and I don't set limits when it comes to taking on new technical challenges.

from.title: Where I'm from
from.body: I live in Manta, Ecuador, and from here I work with clients and projects without borders.

going.title: Where I'm going
going.body: My goal is to grow in the international programming job market: working with teams from anywhere in the world, across America, Europe, Asia and beyond.

Projects.heading: Featured projects
Projects.subheading: Some of the projects I've been working on lately.

constructora-gl-pro.title: Constructora GL Pro
constructora-gl-pro.description: Corporate website for a modular housing construction company, with an editable CMS to manage content and projects.

crossworlds-connections.title: Crossworlds Connections
crossworlds-connections.description: Institutional website for a missions organization, with sections for volunteering, donations, and community programs.

erp-crossworld.title: Crossworlds ERP
erp-crossworld.description: Internal ERP to manage students, classes, attendance, enrollments, and staff for the organization's educational programs.

mariachi-el-rey-manta.title: Mariachi El Rey Manta
mariachi-el-rey-manta.description: Landing page for a mariachi group, showcasing live performances and direct booking contact.

pacheco-landing.title: Pacheco Landing
pacheco-landing.description: Personal landing page for a musician, presenting his artistic background and event gallery.

Skills.heading: Skills & experience
Skills.subheading: The technologies and tools I use every day.

Github.heading: GitHub activity
Github.subheading: This is what my code looks like in motion, day after day.

Contact.heading: Let's talk
Contact.subheading: Have a project in mind or just want to chat? Reach out.
